        set -e
        echo "🚀 Starting Puppeteer script execution..."
        echo "🌍 Running in timezone: Africa/Nairobi"
        echo "🕐 Execution started at: $(TZ=Africa/Nairobi date)"

        # Navigate to the puppeteer scripts directory
        cd /opt/airflow/src/scripts/execute_puppeteer || {
            echo "❌ Puppeteer scripts directory not found"
            exit 1
        }

        # Set environment variables
        export MONGODB_URI="{{ var.value.MONGODB_URI }}"
        export NODE_ENV=production

        echo "🔍 Executing Puppeteer script..."
        
        # Execute the main.js file with timeout
        timeout 300 node main.js || {
            EXIT_CODE=$?
            if [ $EXIT_CODE -eq 124 ]; then
                echo "❌ Puppeteer script timed out after 300 seconds"
            else
                echo "❌ Puppeteer script failed with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
            fi
            exit 1
        }

        echo "✅ Puppeteer script execution completed successfully"
        echo "🕐 Execution completed at: $(TZ=Africa/Nairobi date)"
    "}], "dag_dependencies": [], "params": {}}}

{"__version": 1, "dag": {"fileloc": "/opt/airflow/dags/extract_links.py", "_task_group": {"_group_id": null, "prefix_group_id": true, "tooltip": "", "ui_color": "CornflowerBlue", "ui_fgcolor": "#000", "children": {"start_chrome": ["operator", "start_chrome"], "chrome_health_check": ["operator", "chrome_health_check"], "wait_period": ["operator", "wait_period"], "extract_data": ["operator", "extract_data"], "cleanup_chrome": ["operator", "cleanup_chrome"]}, "upstream_group_ids": [], "downstream_group_ids": [], "upstream_task_ids": [], "downstream_task_ids": []}, "_dag_id": "extract_links", "dataset_triggers": [], "edge_info": {}, "timezone": "Africa/Nairobi", "max_active_runs": 1, "_description": "Manual Automa workflow with Chrome debugging and data extraction - No retries (Africa/Nairobi)", "catchup": false, "default_args": {"__var": {"owner": "airflow", "start_date": {"__var": 1750971600.0, "__type": "datetime"}, "retries": 0, "max_active_tis_per_dag": 1}, "__type": "dict"}, "schedule_interval": null, "_processor_dags_folder": "/opt/airflow/dags", "tasks": [{"is_setup": false, "pool": "default_pool", "downstream_task_ids": ["chrome_health_check"], "is_teardown": false, "template_ext": [".sh", ".bash"], "on_failure_fail_dagrun": false, "owner": "airflow", "ui_color": "#f0ede4", "task_id": "start_chrome", "ui_fgcolor": "#000", "template_fields": ["bash_command", "env"], "template_fields_renderers": {"bash_command": "bash", "env": "json"}, "max_active_tis_per_dag": 1, "start_date": 1750971600.0, "_task_type": "BashOperator", "_task_module": "airflow.operators.bash", "_is_empty": false, "bash_command": "
        set -e

        echo "🚀 Enhanced Chrome cleanup process..."
        echo "🌍 Running in timezone: Africa/Nairobi"
        echo "🕐 Current time: $(TZ=Africa/Nairobi date)"
        
        # Kill all Chrome processes more aggressively
        pkill -f "google-chrome" 2>/dev/null || true
        pkill -f "chrome" 2>/dev/null || true
        pkill -f "Xvfb" 2>/dev/null || true
        
        # Wait for processes to die
        sleep 3
        
        # Force kill if still running
        pkill -9 -f "google-chrome" 2>/dev/null || true
        pkill -9 -f "chrome" 2>/dev/null || true
        pkill -9 -f "Xvfb" 2>/dev/null || true
        
        # Clean up any lock files in the profile directory
        CHROME_PROFILE_DIR="/opt/airflow/chrome_persistent_profile"
        if [ -d "$CHROME_PROFILE_DIR" ]; then
            echo "🧹 Cleaning Chrome profile locks..."
            rm -rf "$CHROME_PROFILE_DIR/SingletonLock" 2>/dev/null || true
            rm -rf "$CHROME_PROFILE_DIR/Singleton*" 2>/dev/null || true
            rm -rf "$CHROME_PROFILE_DIR/lockfile" 2>/dev/null || true
            rm -rf "$CHROME_PROFILE_DIR/Default/Preferences" 2>/dev/null || true
            
            # Clean up any other lock files
            find "$CHROME_PROFILE_DIR" -name "*lock*" -type f -delete 2>/dev/null || true
            find "$CHROME_PROFILE_DIR" -name "*Lock*" -type f -delete 2>/dev/null || true
        fi
        
        echo "✅ Chrome cleanup completed"

        export DISPLAY=:99
        export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/tmp/runtime-airflow
        mkdir -p "$XDG_RUNTIME_DIR"

        echo "🖥️ Starting Xvfb..."
        nohup Xvfb :99 -screen 0 1920x1080x24 -ac +extension RANDR +extension GLX +render -noreset -dpi 96 > /tmp/xvfb.log 2>&1 &
        XVFB_PID=$!
        sleep 5


        # Ensure profile directory exists and is clean
        mkdir -p "$CHROME_PROFILE_DIR"
        chmod 755 "$CHROME_PROFILE_DIR"
        echo "📁 Using persistent profile: $CHROME_PROFILE_DIR"

        echo "🌐 Starting Chrome with Automa..."
        nohup google-chrome-stable             --no-sandbox             --disable-setuid-sandbox             --disable-gpu             --disable-software-rasterizer             --disable-dev-shm-usage             --disable-default-apps             --disable-component-update             --user-data-dir="$CHROME_PROFILE_DIR"             --disable-extensions-except="$AUTOMA_DIR"             --load-extension="$AUTOMA_DIR"             --remote-debugging-port=9222             --remote-debugging-address=0.0.0.0             --disable-features=UseOzonePlatform,VizDisplayCompositor,TranslateUI             --disable-background-timer-throttling             --disable-backgrounding-occluded-windows             --disable-renderer-backgrounding             --disable-field-trial-config             --disable-back-forward-cache             --disable-ipc-flooding-protection             --window-size=1920,1080             --no-first-run             --no-default-browser-check             --display=:99             --headless=new             --disable-web-security             --disable-features=VizDisplayCompositor             chrome-extension://infppggnoaenmfagbfknfkancpbljcca/newtab.html > /tmp/chrome.log 2>&1 &

        CHROME_PID=$!
        echo "$CHROME_PID" > /tmp/chrome.pid
        echo "$XVFB_PID" > /tmp/xvfb.pid

        echo "⏳ Waiting for Chrome to start..."
        TIMEOUT=45
        COUNTER=0
        while [ $COUNTER -lt $TIMEOUT ]; do
            if curl -sf http://localhost:9222/json/version > /dev/null 2>&1; then
                echo "✅ Chrome is ready"
                break
            fi
            if ! kill -0 "$CHROME_PID" 2>/dev/null; then
                echo "❌ Chrome died unexpectedly"
                echo "Chrome log contents:"
                cat /tmp/chrome.log || echo "No Chrome log available"
                exit 1
            fi
            echo "Waiting... ($COUNTER/$TIMEOUT)"
            sleep 2
            COUNTER=$((COUNTER + 1))
        done

        if [ $COUNTER -eq $TIMEOUT ]; then
            echo "❌ Chrome failed to respond in time"
            echo "Chrome log contents:"
            cat /tmp/chrome.log || echo "No Chrome log available"
            exit 1
        fi

        echo "✅ Chrome with extensions started successfully"
        echo "🕐 Chrome started at: $(TZ=Africa/Nairobi date)"
        sleep 10
    "}, {"is_setup": false, "pool": "default_pool", "downstream_task_ids": ["wait_period"], "is_teardown": false, "template_ext": [], "on_failure_fail_dagrun": false, "owner": "airflow", "ui_color": "#ffefeb", "task_id": "chrome_health_check", "ui_fgcolor": "#000", "template_fields": ["templates_dict", "op_args", "op_kwargs"], "template_fields_renderers": {"templates_dict": "json", "op_args": "py", "op_kwargs": "py"}, "max_active_tis_per_dag": 1, "start_date": 1750971600.0, "_task_type": "PythonOperator", "_task_module": "airflow.operators.python", "_is_empty": false, "op_args": [], "op_kwargs": {}}, {"is_setup": false, "pool": "default_pool", "downstream_task_ids": ["extract_data"], "is_teardown": false, "template_ext": [".sh", ".bash"], "on_failure_fail_dagrun": false, "owner": "airflow", "ui_color": "#f0ede4", "task_id": "wait_period", "ui_fgcolor": "#000", "template_fields": ["bash_command", "env"], "template_fields_renderers": {"bash_command": "bash", "env": "json"}, "max_active_tis_per_dag": 1, "start_date": 1750971600.0, "_task_type": "BashOperator", "_task_module": "airflow.operators.bash", "_is_empty": false, "bash_command": "
        echo "⏳ Waiting for workflow results to settle..."
        echo "🕐 Wait started at: $(TZ=Africa/Nairobi date)"
        sleep 30
        echo "✅ Wait period completed"
        echo "🕐 Wait ended at: $(TZ=Africa/Nairobi date)"
    "}, {"is_setup": false, "pool": "default_pool", "downstream_task_ids": ["cleanup_chrome"], "is_teardown": false, "template_ext": [".sh", ".bash"], "on_failure_fail_dagrun": false, "owner": "airflow", "ui_color": "#f0ede4", "task_id": "extract_data", "ui_fgcolor": "#000", "template_fields": ["bash_command", "env"], "template_fields_renderers": {"bash_command": "bash", "env": "json"}, "max_active_tis_per_dag": 1, "start_date": 1750971600.0, "_task_type": "BashOperator", "_task_module": "airflow.operators.bash", "_is_empty": false, "bash_command": "
        set -e
        echo "🔍 Starting data extraction..."
        echo "🕐 Extraction started at: $(TZ=Africa/Nairobi date)"

        if ! curl -sf http://localhost:9222/json/version > /dev/null; then
            echo "❌ Chrome is not responding"
            exit 1
        fi

        cd /opt/airflow/src/scripts/extraction || {
            echo "❌ Extraction scripts directory not found"
            exit 1
        }

        export MONGODB_URI="{{ var.value.MONGODB_URI }}"
        export NODE_ENV=production
        export CHROME_DEBUG_PORT=9222

        echo "🔍 Executing data extraction..."
        timeout 180 node main.js || {
            EXIT_CODE=$?
            if [ $EXIT_CODE -eq 124 ]; then
                echo "❌ Data extraction timed out after 180 seconds"
            else
                echo "❌ Data extraction failed with exit code: $EXIT_CODE"
            fi
            exit 1
        }

        echo "✅ Data extraction completed successfully"
        echo "🕐 Extraction completed at: $(TZ=Africa/Nairobi date)"
    "}, {"is_setup": false, "pool": "default_pool", "downstream_task_ids": [], "is_teardown": false, "template_ext": [".sh", ".bash"], "trigger_rule": "all_done", "on_failure_fail_dagrun": false, "owner": "airflow", "ui_color": "#f0ede4", "task_id": "cleanup_chrome", "ui_fgcolor": "#000", "template_fields": ["bash_command", "env"], "template_fields_renderers": {"bash_command": "bash", "env": "json"}, "max_active_tis_per_dag": 1, "start_date": 1750971600.0, "_task_type": "BashOperator", "_task_module": "airflow.operators.bash", "_is_empty": false, "bash_command": "
        echo "🧹 Starting enhanced cleanup..."
        echo "🕐 Cleanup started at: $(TZ=Africa/Nairobi date)"

        # Kill Chrome processes
        if [ -f /tmp/chrome.pid ]; then
            CHROME_PID=$(cat /tmp/chrome.pid)
            echo "Killing Chrome process $CHROME_PID"
            kill -TERM "$CHROME_PID" 2>/dev/null || true
            sleep 5
            kill -KILL "$CHROME_PID" 2>/dev/null || true
            rm -f /tmp/chrome.pid
        fi

        # Kill Xvfb processes
        if [ -f /tmp/xvfb.pid ]; then
            XVFB_PID=$(cat /tmp/xvfb.pid)
            echo "Killing Xvfb process $XVFB_PID"
            kill -TERM "$XVFB_PID" 2>/dev/null || true
            sleep 2
            kill -KILL "$XVFB_PID" 2>/dev/null || true
            rm -f /tmp/xvfb.pid
        fi

        # Force kill any remaining processes
        pkill -f "google-chrome" 2>/dev/null || true
        pkill -f "chrome" 2>/dev/null || true
        pkill -f "Xvfb" 2>/dev/null || true
        
        # Wait and force kill
        sleep 2
        pkill -9 -f "google-chrome" 2>/dev/null || true
        pkill -9 -f "chrome" 2>/dev/null || true
        pkill -9 -f "Xvfb" 2>/dev/null || true

        # Clean up profile locks again
        CHROME_PROFILE_DIR="/opt/airflow/chrome_persistent_profile"
        if [ -d "$CHROME_PROFILE_DIR" ]; then
            echo "🧹 Final cleanup of Chrome profile locks..."
            rm -rf "$CHROME_PROFILE_DIR/SingletonLock" 2>/dev/null || true
            rm -rf "$CHROME_PROFILE_DIR/Singleton*" 2>/dev/null || true
            rm -rf "$CHROME_PROFILE_DIR/lockfile" 2>/dev/null || true
            find "$CHROME_PROFILE_DIR" -name "*lock*" -type f -delete 2>/dev/null || true
            find "$CHROME_PROFILE_DIR" -name "*Lock*" -type f -delete 2>/dev/null || true
        fi

        # Clean up temporary files
        rm -rf /tmp/runtime-airflow 2>/dev/null || true
        rm -f /tmp/chrome.log 2>/dev/null || true
        rm -f /tmp/xvfb.log 2>/dev/null || true

        echo "✅ Enhanced cleanup completed"
        echo "🕐 Cleanup completed at: $(TZ=Africa/Nairobi date)"
    "}], "dag_dependencies": [], "params": {}}}
